rows.locks: The source-project glTF fixture covers billboard, sprite-stack, and 2D-in-3D plane extras normalized into Rust-owned nativeScene.presentationLayers as presentation-only evidence.
Every M98 presentation layer carries presentation-only authority and validation rejects any bounded primitive that drifts into deterministic logic or evidence mutation authority.
Unsupported presentation kinds and logic-coupled presentation extras fail or remain Yellow fidelity gaps instead of being silently graded clean/Green.
Forged ported, auto-ported, auto-translated, or behavior-equivalent claims fail validation without captured passing oracle evidence.
The report validator recomputes stateHashPrimary over the Rust-owned native scene and fails stale hashes; changed M98 presentation source changes the deterministic hash.
Coverage v84 records the M98 presentation regression suite, demo fixture, render smoke, open #1/#23 governance anchors, and exact verification command shape from #2199.

boundary: Scenario Coverage v84 is a Rust data-plane regression suite for Era P M98 billboard, sprite-stack, and 2D-in-3D presentation layers. It locks source-project/open-text glTF presentation extras, one-way import to Ouroforge-native skeleton evidence, no foreign runtime bridge, no auto-port or ported claim without a passing oracle, honest Yellow/Red fidelity for lossy or logic-coupled presentation, deterministic state-hash primary behavior including stale-hash rejection, perceptual render secondary-only corroboration, and Rust-owned artifact truth. Elixir/Phoenix Studio is not touched and has no trusted write or artifact semantics authority. #1 and #23 remain open.
